seoTitle: Santa Ana Unified Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: View the Santa Ana Unified Calendar 2026-2027 with first day of school, SAUSD school holidays, Thanksgiving Recess, Winter Break, Spring Recess, student-free days, PDF and calendar download.
heroSummary: Santa Ana Unified Calendar 2026-2027 starts instruction on Monday, August 10, 2026 and ends on Wednesday, May 26, 2027. Thanksgiving Recess runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21, 2026-January 1, 2027, and Spring Recess runs April 5-9, 2027.
calendarNotes: Santa Ana Unified starts instruction on August 10, 2026 and lists May 26, 2027 as the last day of instruction. Students attend 180 days, while the calendar lists 187 teacher duty days. The PDF includes grade-span notes for elementary, intermediate, high school, and educational options, including parent conference windows, student-free days, modified days, and SAUSD academic calendar details.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Santa Ana Unified start school in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Santa Ana Unified starts instruction on Monday, August 10, 2026. The first day of service for staff is August 5, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is SAUSD Spring Recess in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess runs Monday, April 5 through Friday, April 9, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Santa Ana Unified in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of instruction is Wednesday, May 26, 2027. The last day of service is Friday, May 28, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are on the SAUSD 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The official 2026-2027 academic calendar lists 180 student instructional days.
Santa Ana Unified Thanksgiving Recess runs Monday, November 23 through Friday, November 27, 2026.
SAUSD Winter Break runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027. Spring instruction begins Monday, January 4, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Does SAUSD have school on Monday holidays?
calendarFaqs.a: No-school dates depend on the official academic calendar. Families should check the listed holidays, student-free days, and recesses instead of assuming every federal holiday is observed.

calendarFaqs.q: What days are there no school in SAUSD 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: SAUSD no school days include listed holidays, Thanksgiving Recess, Winter Break, Spring Recess, student-free days, and duty days marked for no student attendance. Families should confirm grade-span notes because some student-free or modified dates apply to specific school levels.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the SAUSD calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the official Santa Ana Unified academic calendar PDF linked from this page for the source calendar. MySchoolDates also provides a searchable date list and a one-time calendar download file.

customSections.label: Why Use This SAUSD Calendar Page?
customSections.content: The official district PDF is the source document, but this page makes the Santa Ana Unified calendar easier to search, scan, and use.

groups.label: What this page helps with
items: View important SAUSD dates by category.
Search school breaks, holidays, student-free days, and recesses without opening a PDF.
Download calendar events for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.
Review major SAUSD school dates, PDF access, and calendar download options in one place.

customSections.label: Santa Ana Unified 2026-2027 Calendar Highlights
customSections.content: The main SAUSD planning dates for the 2026-2027 school year include the first instruction day, Thanksgiving Recess, Winter Break, Spring Recess, and the last day of instruction.

customSections.label: What's New in the 2026-2027 SAUSD Calendar?
customSections.content: The 2026-2027 Santa Ana Unified academic calendar continues the district's traditional structure with 180 student instructional days, two academic semesters, Thanksgiving Recess, Winter Break, Spring Recess, student-free days, and professional duty days. Families should review the official district calendar each year because parent conference windows, modified days, and professional development schedules can change.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Recess
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Recess is listed for April 5-9, 2027.
